Text.Page:
Hoglings like shiny things—especially beads, it seems.

Yesterday, they took the beads from me and went back into forest!

Please! They've been in my family for ages. Can you bring them back?
There they are! Yes, these are exatly right. Thank you so much! I'd hate to have lost these.
Oh goodness, can you not find them? Oh, this is terrible!
